instruction: You need to catch up on discussion board participation across all your courses. For each course with open discussions: (1) Check the discussion requirements (minimum posts and minimum replies). (2) Read existing classmate posts to understand the conversation. (3) Post substantive original responses (at least 30 characters each) to meet the minimum post requirement. (4) Reply to at least the required number of classmate posts with substantive replies (at least 20 characters each). Complete all open discussions across all courses.
